results.title: Donald Trump Calls on Israel and Iran To ‘Immediately Stop Shooting’ As Tensions Escalate
results.description: US President Donald Trump has called on Israel and Iran to 'immediately stop shooting' after the two countries exchanged attacks in their most serious confrontation since a ceasefire began two months ago. The appeal comes as regional tensions rise, diplomatic efforts face challenges, and concerns grow over the stability of the fragile ceasefire in the Middle East.
